pundits.name: Eric Wynalda
pundits.take:
You're all in over your heads, but let's break down the trainwrecks one by one. First off, Gayden, you're the only one here with half a clue. You're sitting pretty at the top with England and a couple of savvy Tier 3 picks, Korea Republic and Turkey, killing it—you must have actually watched a match or two. 

Now, Zach and Gunner, you're dabbling in mediocrity. Zach, you're clinging to Brazil like a lifeline, but let's face it, anyone could have made that pick after watching a five-second ad on YouTube. Meanwhile, Gunner, picking DR Congo doesn't show hidden depth; it shows a complete misfire. I suspect you were dazzled by a random highlight reel rather than any actual potential. 

Devin, what an utter disaster. The sheer idiocy of picking Haiti in Tier 4 makes me wonder if your decisions are based on jersey colors or a FIFA game you played in 2012. Zero points and still not a reality check? If you were in a locker room, you'd be benched already. This fantasy pool is clearer than a bright stadium light—some of you don't belong on the same pitch.

pundits.name: Landon Donovan
pundits.take:
Look, I get why people might think Devin has some potential here, with Spain and the USA on his roster, but bless his heart, drafting Haiti—especially in the fourth round—that just screams panic. I mean, maybe he was swept up in their jersey's vibrant colors or was inspired by an emotional YouTube montage, but let's face it, it hasn't paid off, as he sits at zero points. 

And while Gayden leads the standings, I think it's important to note that his current success might be more about the lack of real competition than some incredible strategy. Picking Turkey and Korea Republic, both Tier 3, isn't exactly groundbreaking—it's more like the bare minimum of research. Meanwhile, Gunner must have been watching a bit too much French New Wave cinema instead of actual team performance, because with France only drawing Morocco, the poor guy's stuck at a single point. But hey, everyone's got a strategy, right? Even if it’s a bit misguided.

pundits.name: Clint Dempsey
pundits.take:
Well, look at Gayden, ridin' high with 6 points. Folks might say he's doin' somethin' right, but I reckon he just picked Korea Republic 'cause he thought "Gangnam Style" was a goal celebration. Meanwhile, Gunner's sittin' at a measly 1 point. I swear, Gunner must've drafted Morocco thinkin' it was a new coffee flavor at Starbucks, and he's gettin' cooked worse than a scrambled egg right now.

And poor Devin, holdin' up the rear with a big ol' goose egg. Devin saw Haiti and South Africa on the board and thought they might surprise 'cause he heard a rumor in a FIFA video game forum. Zach's hangin' in there with 4 points, probably feelin' smug watchin' Switzerland squeak out a win. But man, pickin' Saudi Arabia in T4 — Zach must think petro dollars'll buy him some goals. Gayden's got the lead, but with y'all's picks, it's like playin' poker with Uno cards.

pundits.name: Alexi Lalas
pundits.take:
Listen up, folks — let me tell you something about this travesty of a fantasy World Cup pool. Gayden, you're sitting on top with a measly 6 points. That's like winning a race because everyone else tripped at the starting line. I know you think grabbing England in the first tier was a smart move, but let’s be honest, you just like Harry Kane’s haircut. And those wins with Korea Republic and Turkey? Maybe if you spent more time watching the game and less time scrolling through Instagram, you'd know they were just flukes.

Zach, are you serious? You’re in second place with a paltry 4 points. Drafting Brazil and Switzerland? That’s like saying you watched a single 2002 highlight reel and called it a night. You didn't even have the guts to draft a Tier 4 team that could actually steal a point or two. Look at me, Zach. LOOK AT ME. You bet on Czechia based on one YouTube highlight. How's that working out for you? Mediocrity is the story of your life.

And Devin, what are you doing with zero points, buddy? Did you pick Bosnia because you once saw a good result on FIFA 2014? Draft a team that can actually score! It
